introSection: Kampala Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Knuthenborg Safaripark in Maribo, Sjælland, Denmark. Kampala is the capital city of Uganda. It was the first installation of Gerstlauers Bob Coaster model.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Kampala Express is the only Bob Coaster to use a base frame instead of footers.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Orange track and dark green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble an engine. This train theme also appeared on the ride's clone; Bucklbahn.

fullText:
Kampala Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Knuthenborg Safaripark in Maribo, Sjælland, Denmark. Kampala is the capital city of Uganda. It was the first installation of Gerstlauers Bob Coaster model.

Kampala Express is the only Bob Coaster to use a base frame instead of footers.

Orange track and dark green supports.

The train is designed to resemble an engine. This train theme also appeared on the ride's clone; Bucklbahn.
